title: Talk to Data: Plain-Language Questions on Your Upload
summary: Talk to Data lets you ask questions in plain language against the file you uploaded and filtered.

content.summary: Talk to Data lets you ask questions in plain language against the file you uploaded and filtered.

body.text: It is conversational analytics scoped to your table—not the open internet. Preview columns, apply saved rules, then ask specific questions referencing fields and date ranges. Verify answers with charts in the same session before sharing.

body.alt: Person working with spreadsheets and notes
body.caption: Person working with spreadsheets and notes. Photo: Unsplash

body.text: Preview columns, apply saved rules, then ask specific questions referencing fields and date ranges.
Verify answers with charts in the same session before sharing.

items: Best for totals, rankings, and comparisons you can chart-check.

body.text: Talk to Data is a copilot: fast drafts and exploration, human verification for decisions.
Teams build prompt libraries of verified questions over time.
Talk to Data completes Datilio's upload-to-insight loop with grounded language.

meta_description: Talk to Data lets you ask questions in plain language against the file you uploaded and filtered.
meta_keywords: Talk to Data, Datilio, AI, Natural Language
